ksa_text: Skill in producing enterprise data architecture artifacts, including data flow diagrams, entity-relationship models, data domain maps, and integration architecture documentation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-S-001 (Data Architecture/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.440, highest: DDaT at 0.440). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.440, and Data Architecture (DA) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Architecture KSA (composite 0.440)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings does not surface this Data Architecture competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
